summary: Comprehensive A-to-Z QA Audit - Iteration 52. All critical issues from iteration 51 are FIXED. Image-to-Video and Video Remix endpoints NOW WORK (fixed module import error). Cashfree PRODUCTION mode verified. 26/27 backend tests pass.

minor.issue: Response uses 'credits' key instead of 'balance' - not a bug, just API format

NOTE: These use OpenAIVideoGeneration which generates from prompt only (not true image-to-video). Real image-to-video would need a different API. Current implementation generates video from text prompt describing the motion.

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Changed 'from emergentintegrations.llm.sora2' to 'from emergentintegrations.llm.openai.video_generation' in process_image_to_video and process_video_remix functions

NOTE: The OpenAI Video Generation API (Sora 2) generates videos from text prompts, not from input images/videos. The current implementation uses the motion_prompt/remix_prompt to generate new videos. True image-to-video or video remix functionality would require a different API that supports input media.
All validations working correctly: consent required, file type validation, prompt length validation, file size limits

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load correctly, all UI elements present and functional

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Profile_QA52 style profile during testing (20 credits)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All GenStudio endpoints now implemented and working. Image-to-video and video-remix use Sora 2 (text-to-video) generation - they accept file uploads but generation is based on the text prompt. Cashfree is in PRODUCTION mode with cf_order_* format. All validations (consent, file type, prompt length) working correctly.

pages_tested.gen_studio_text_to_image: PASS - 8 Quick Templates visible, all settings working
pages_tested.gen_studio_image_to_video: PASS - Upload, motion prompt, duration settings, 36 credits shown
pages_tested.gen_studio_video_remix: PASS - Upload, remix instructions, style settings, 12 credits shown
pages_tested.gen_studio_style_profiles: PASS - Profiles listed, New Profile button working
pages_tested.billing: PASS - 4 subscriptions + 3 credit packs displayed correctly
pages_tested.creator_tools: PASS - Calendar, Carousel, Hashtags, Thumbnails, Trending, Convert tabs

fixes_applied.image_to_video_module_fix: Changed import from non-existent 'emergentintegrations.llm.sora2' to working 'emergentintegrations.llm.openai.video_generation'
fixes_applied.video_remix_module_fix: Same fix applied to video remix background task
